# CloudLedger Resources Domain API

`v1.0.0` · OpenAPI 3.0.3

> The CloudLedger Resources domain — the read surface over the AWS inventory the
> Collector aggregates into Postgres. Read-only: this API never mutates an AWS resource.
>
>   * /resources — resourcesapi (EC2 · S3 · RDS · Lambda inventory)

## Servers

- `{scheme}://{host}:{port}` — resources (local)

## resources:resources

### GET `/resources/resources`

**List inventory resources**

The aggregated AWS resources, newest sweep first. Filter by `service`, `account_id`, `region`, or a free-text `q` matched against name and ARN. Excludes soft-deleted rows unless `include_deleted=true`.

Operation ID: `resources_listResources`

#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version` | header | string | — | (default: `1`) |
| `page` | query | integer (int32) | — | (default: `1`; min 1) |
| `page_size` | query | integer (int32) | — | (default: `50`; min 1; max 200) |
| `service` | query | string | — | Only resources for this AWS service. (enum: `ec2`, `s3`, `rds`, `lambda`) |
| `account_id` | query | integer (int64) | — |  |
| `region` | query | string | — |  |
| `q` | query | string | — | Case-insensitive substring matched against name and ARN. |
| `include_deleted` | query | boolean | — | (default: `false`) |

#### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | A page of resources. |
| `401` | Missing or invalid bearer token. |

**Response `200`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [ResourcePage](#schema-resourcepage)

**Response `401`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [Error](#schema-error)

### GET `/resources/resources/{arn}`

**Get one resource by ARN**

Operation ID: `resources_getResource`

#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version` | header | string | — | (default: `1`) |
| `arn` | path | string | yes | URL-encoded canonical AWS ARN. |

#### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | The resource. |
| `404` | No such resource. |

**Response `200`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [Resource](#schema-resource)

**Response `404`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [Error](#schema-error)

## resources:accounts

### GET `/resources/accounts`

**List swept AWS accounts**

Operation ID: `resources_listAccounts`

#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version` | header | string | — | (default: `1`) |

#### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | The configured accounts. |

**Response `200`**

Content type: `application/json`

Type: array<[Account](#schema-account)>

## Schemas

### Schema: Account

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer (int64) | yes |  |
| `aws_account_id` | string | yes |  |
| `name` | string | yes |  |

### Schema: Resource

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `arn` | string | yes |  |
| `account_id` | integer (int64) | — |  |
| `service` | string | yes | (enum: `ec2`, `s3`, `rds`, `lambda`) |
| `resource_type` | string | yes |  |
| `region` | string | yes |  |
| `name` | string | — | (nullable) |
| `tags` | object | — |  |
| `attributes` | object | — | Service-specific shape |
| `collected_at` | string (date-time) | yes |  |
| `deleted_at` | string (date-time) | — | (nullable) |

### Schema: ResourcePage

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | array<[Resource](#schema-resource)> | yes |  |
| `page` | integer (int32) | yes |  |
| `page_size` | integer (int32) | yes |  |
| `total` | integer (int64) | yes |  |

### Schema: Error

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `code` | string | yes |  |
| `message` | string | yes |  |
